trackOrder.question: How do I track my order?
trackOrder.answer: You can track your order by going to 'My Orders' section in your profile. Each order will show its current status and tracking information. You'll also receive email updates when your order status changes.

returnPolicy.question: What is your return policy?
returnPolicy.answer: We offer a 30-day return policy for most items. Products must be in original condition and packaging. Auto parts that have been installed cannot be returned unless they are defective. Contact our support team to initiate a return.

partFit.question: How do I know if a part fits my car?
partFit.answer: Add your car to 'My Garage' for personalized part recommendations. Each product page shows compatibility information. You can also use our vehicle search feature or contact our technical support for assistance.

paymentMethods.question: What payment methods do you accept?
paymentMethods.answer: You can pay using credit or debit card, CliQ, or cash on delivery. Depending on what's available in your area. All payments are securely processed and encrypted for your protection.

shippingTime.question: How long does shipping take?
shippingTime.answer: Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days within Jordan. Express shipping (1-2 days) is available for urgent orders. International shipping times vary by location. You'll see estimated delivery dates at checkout.
